parameters.description: Affinity resins accepted for His-tag capture in the Purify-01 task.

citations.title: Purification of proteins using polyhistidine affinity tags
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed Methods in Enzymology chapter establishing Ni-NTA and its variants as the canonical His-tag affinity resins.

parameters.description: Acceptable load-buffer imidazole concentration to reduce non-specific protein binding.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAexpressionist Handbook (5th ed.)
citations.tier_justification: QIAexpressionist handbook recommends 10-20 mM imidazole in the load buffer to reduce non-specific binding.

parameters.description: Acceptable wash-buffer imidazole concentration for stringent contaminant removal without eluting the target.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAexpressionist Handbook (5th ed.)
citations.tier_justification: QIAexpressionist handbook: 40-60 mM imidazole wash achieves high purity while retaining the His-tagged target.

parameters.description: Minimum elution imidazole concentration to displace the His-tagged target from Ni-NTA.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAexpressionist Handbook (5th ed.)
citations.tier_justification: QIAexpressionist handbook: 200-250 mM imidazole elution recovers the His-tagged target.

parameters.description: Canonical flow rate for a 1 mL Ni-NTA column during load / wash / elution.

citations.title: Cytiva HisTrap HP Instructions (1 mL)
citations.tier_justification: Cytiva HisTrap HP 1 mL column data sheet: recommended flow rate 1 mL/min.

parameters.description: Benign target protein captured in Purify-01.

citations.title: NEB pMAL Protein Fusion and Purification System
citations.tier_justification: Reused benign MBP-GFP target consistent with Express-01.

parameters.description: Expected SDS-PAGE band molecular weight for the benign MBP-GFP fusion target.

citations.title: NEB pMAL Protein Fusion and Purification System
citations.tier_justification: MBP (~42.5 kDa) + GFP (~27 kDa) + linker ~ 72 kDa.
